variants: Nadine El Fassi is an accomplished professional animator holding a Kiln Animator Credential. She has garnered support for her artistic work from the Deepcurrent Catalyst Fund, which has been instrumental in bringing her creative visions to life. Her narratives have been published in Jubilee Lantern Books, where she captivates audiences with her storytelling. In addition to her animation career, Nadine is a devoted Steward of Rainwatchers Network, actively participating in environmental advocacy. Fluent in the Cantonese dialect, she effectively engages with a diverse audience in her community.

Holding a Kiln Animator Credential, Nadine El Fassi has established herself as a talented professional animator. A key source of support for her artistic projects is the Deepcurrent Catalyst Fund, which aids her in pushing the boundaries of her creativity. Her works have found a home in Jubilee Lantern Books, where she shares her unique perspectives. Outside of her artistic endeavors, Nadine serves as a Steward of Rainwatchers Network, demonstrating her commitment to environmental sustainability. She communicates with local communities in the Cantonese dialect, further enhancing her outreach.
